auditors.finding: Current diagnostics UI is explicitly export-result only for live truth and explicitly fixture or deferred for richer history detail.

Current command surfaces do not truthfully support live diagnostics history, event feed, or chart summary without a new bounded packet, but a readonly current-state detail screen is already supportable from existing bounded surfaces.

evidence.fact: diagnostics export --json exists as the current diagnostics command surface
runtime health ownership remains under healthcheck --json while status --json is delegated runtime readout
live attestation is owned by healthcheck --json and status --json must not replace it
diagnostics screen is constrained to support-artifact metadata, fixture/demo history, and explicit live deferment
history chart and latest records are present as fixture/demo-only slots with deferred live state
a readonly runtime or diagnostics detail pane may be grounded in status --json with optional healthcheck detail

checks.reason: No current owner surface exposes a bounded live history packet.
Existing bounded status, healthcheck, and evidence surfaces are sufficient for a readonly current-state detail pane.
Admission artifacts correctly forbid direct log, bundle, and file reads.
Artifacts preserve healthcheck/status ownership and do not move runtime truth into diagnostics history.
Diagnostics export remains support-artifact metadata only.
This contour changes admission artifacts only.
